notes: Belgium has a tax-free mileage allowance maximum rate that is indexed.
Employers can typically choose either an annually indexed rate (fixed for a 12-month period) or a quarterly indexed rate (adjusted every quarter).
This dataset stores commonly published maximums; always verify against the official Belgian publication/circular for payroll/legal use.

indexationSystems.label: Annual indexed maximum (fixed for 12 months once chosen)

series.sourceHint: Publicly published annual indexed mileage allowance (Jul 2025–Jun 2026).
Publicly published quarterly indexed mileage allowance (Oct–Dec 2025).
Publicly published quarterly indexed mileage allowance (Jan–Mar 2026).

taxTreatment.typicalTreatment: Tax-free / social-security-exempt up to the published maximum when conditions are met.
taxTreatment.note: If mileage exceeds the cap, proof may be required depending on employer policy/administration.
